steps.name: log Positive test scenario
Before@positive
log Initialized API client
Before@api
log API base URL set to: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com
Given the API base URL is "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com"
log Content-Type header set to: application/json
And the request content type is "application/json"
log Request body stored: {"title":"Cypress BDD API Test","body":"This post was created during automated API testing.","userId":1}
Given I set the request body:
log POST https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts
log Body: {"title":"Cypress BDD API Test","body":"This post was created during automated API testing.","userId":1}

request ("{ method: 'POST', url: 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/pos'... 2 more characters, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Accept: 'application/json' }, body: { title: 'Cypress BDD API Test', body: 'This post was created during automated A'... 11 more characters, userId: 1 }, failOnStatusCode: false }")
log API: POST https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts
log Status: 201 (37ms)
log Request Body: {"title":"Cypress BDD API Test","body":"This post was created during automated API testing.","userId":1}
log Response Body: {"title":"Cypress BDD API Test","body":"This post was created during automated API testing.","userId":1,"id":101}
wrap Object{9}
When I send a POST request to "/posts"
Then the response status code should be 201
assertexpected { Object (body, headers, ...) } not to be null
